setup: Re-run on a restarted server; greedy decoding (temperature 0, fixed seed). Genuine ~5 s per card decodes, not a cache replay.
takeaway: Calls reproduce exactly across a restart.

setup: Three reworded system prompts on the same gallery images, vs the canonical-prompt reference on those images.
result: Concordance: compact 66.0%, explicit 69.5%, terse 52.0%. Positive rate: compact 84%, explicit 71%, terse 79% (reference 48% positive over 568).
takeaway: Calls shift with wording; variants over-call.

setup: Same three variants on gallery images, vs the independent render-on-the-fly reference (prompt and render path both differ).
takeaway: Render path adds a second large source of disagreement.
